persona_and_vibe.tone: Premium DevOps Command Center, High-Performance, Brutalist-Tech but Highly Refined
persona_and_vibe.visual_mood: Deep obsidian backgrounds, crisp 1px borders, purposeful negative space, high information density, intense terminal aesthetics for data.

single_source_of_truth: The in-app Design System page (route /design-system, rendered by frontend/src/pages/DesignSystem.jsx) together with frontend/src/styles/design-system.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js are the AUTHORITATIVE source for all UI decisions (fonts, colors, spacing, components). This JSON is a supporting reference only. If anything here ever conflicts with the Design System, the Design System wins. Do NOT reintroduce conflicting rules.

typography.global_instruction: Per Design System section 02 (Typography): body and headings use Geist (primary) with Inter as fallback — clean, modern & easy to read. Use JetBrains Mono ONLY for code, technical data, terminal logs and tabular numeric readouts. Do NOT make the entire UI monospace.

scale.overline_label: text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-muted-foreground
scale.terminal_log: text-[11px] sm:text-xs font-normal leading-relaxed text-zinc-300 tabular-nums

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: High Density Grid for DevOps data, but heavily padded (p-6/p-8) for empty states and forms to maintain premium feel.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Stretch items using h-full to prevent jagged bottoms.
spacing_and_layout.page_structure: Sidebar (w-64) + Main Content Area. Maximum width on main content for ultra-wide monitors (max-w-[1600px] mx-auto).

sidebar_nav.container: w-64 h-screen fixed border-r border-border bg-background flex flex-col
sidebar_nav.item_default: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-white/5 rounded-sm transition-colors cursor-pointer
sidebar_nav.item_active: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-foreground bg-white/5 rounded-sm relative before:absolute before:left-0 before:top-2 before:bottom-2 before:w-[2px] before:bg-primary before:rounded-r-full cursor-default

page_header.container: sticky top-0 z-50 h-16 border-b border-border bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl flex items-center justify-between px-6
page_header.title: text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight

stat_metric_card.container: bg-card border border-border rounded-sm p-5 flex flex-col gap-2 relative overflow-hidden shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.02)]
stat_metric_card.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-muted-foreground

resource_meter.container: w-full h-1.5 bg-muted rounded-full overflow-hidden mt-2

data_table.header_cell: px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-muted-foreground

project_card_grid.container: col-span-1 bg-card border border-border rounded-sm p-6 hover:border-border/80 transition-colors flex flex-col h-full cursor-pointer shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
project_card_grid.footer: mt-auto pt-4 flex items-center justify-between border-t border-border/50 text-xs text-muted-foreground

status_badge.running: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-500 border border-emerald-500/20 text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
status_badge.building: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/20 text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
status_badge.error: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
status_badge.stopped: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm bg-zinc-500/10 text-zinc-400 border border-zinc-500/20 text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
status_badge.created: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/20 text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider
status_badge.dot_active: relative flex h-1.5 w-1.5 ml-0.5 mr-1 block span.animate-ping.absolute.inline-flex.h-full.w-full.rounded-full.opacity-75 block span.relative.inline-flex.rounded-full.h-1.5.w-1.5

buttons.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-sm text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

forms.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-foreground mb-1.5 block
forms.input: flex h-9 w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-background/50 px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:border-primary disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
forms.textarea: flex min-h-[80px] w-full rounded-sm border border-input bg-background/50 px-3 py-2 text-sm shadow-sm focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:border-primary disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
forms.select: Same visual treatment as input, with a custom lucide-react chevron.

tabs.list: inline-flex h-9 items-center justify-center rounded-sm bg-muted/50 p-1 text-muted-foreground
tabs.trigger: inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-sm px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium transition-all focus-visible:outline-none disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 data-[state=active]:bg-background data-[state=active]:text-foreground data-[state=active]:shadow-sm data-[state=active]:border data-[state=active]:border-border/50

stepper_wizard.container: flex items-center w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-8
stepper_wizard.step_inactive: flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-muted-foreground opacity-50

terminal_log_viewer.container: w-full rounded-sm border border-border bg-[#050505] overflow-hidden flex flex-col font-mono relative shadow-inner
terminal_log_viewer.header: h-10 border-b border-border bg-[#0A0A0A] flex items-center px-4 justify-between
terminal_log_viewer.line_number: w-8 shrink-0 text-muted-foreground/40 text-right pr-3 select-none border-r border-white/5 mr-3

toast.theme_overrides: bg-card border-border text-foreground rounded-sm font-mono text-sm

modal_alert.content: fixed left-[50%] top-[50%] z-50 grid w-full max-w-lg translate-x-[-50%] translate-y-[-50%] gap-4 border border-border bg-background p-6 shadow-xl sm:rounded-sm

empty_states.container: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 text-center border border-dashed border-border rounded-sm bg-muted/10
empty_states.title: text-lg font-medium text-foreground

login_screen.card: w-full max-w-md p-8 border border-border rounded-sm bg-card shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden
login_screen.glow_effect: absolute -top-24 -right-24 w-48 h-48 bg-primary/20 blur-[100px] rounded-full pointer-events-none

patterns.name: DSPanel & DSModal — Header / Body / Footer
patterns.description: Standard structure for form cards (DSPanel) and dialogs (DSModal): a header (title, optional icon, divider border-bottom), a padded body (px-5 py-5, scrollable in modals), and a footer with a subtle tint (bg var(--ds-page)), border-top and right-aligned actions (or Close-left / primary-right).
patterns.usage: Use DSPanel for any settings/form card that has a title and/or a save action. Use DSModal for all confirmation and form dialogs. Import from @/components/ds. Footer buttons that submit a body <form> should use the HTML form="<form-id>" attribute.

motion_guidelines.philosophy: Mechanical, snappy, precise. Micro-interactions should feel instantaneous like a CLI tool, not bouncy or elastic.
motion_guidelines.interactions: Hover states slightly lighten the background and border. Click states slightly scale down (0.98).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML + Tailwind classes inside React components (.js files). Avoid standard Shadcn configurations if they clash with these guidelines.

Follow the in-app Design System (route /design-system) for typography: Geist (primary) / Inter (fallback) for body & headings; JetBrains Mono only for code, technical data and terminal logs. tailwind.config.js sans/heading = Geist/Inter, mono = JetBrains Mono. Do NOT set the whole UI to monospace.
Ensure the terminal log viewer component strictly replicates the CSS specifications provided to look like an actual CLI interface.
Ensure ALL interactive elements and key text nodes include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g. data-testid="deploy-button").
Never use `transition-all` indiscriminately; specifically target `transition-colors`, `transition-opacity`, or `transition-transform`.
No true transparent backgrounds on sticky headers or modals - always use a solid base or backdrop-blur with a semi-opaque background color.
For icons, use `lucide-react` but maintain a strict stroke-width of 1.5 to match the technical/thin vibe of JetBrains Mono.
Toasts must be generated via the `sonner` package, injected at the root level.
Framer motion should only be used for the page transitions (opacity 0 to 1) and status badge pulsing, otherwise keep it pure Tailwind for maximum performance.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You MUST NOT apply universal transitions like `transition: all`. Target specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Respect optical alignment (left-aligned text by default).
Use 1-2x spacing more than usual for form groups. Cramped forms look cheap.
NEVER use emojis as icons. Strictly stick to lucide-react.
